name: Mauritius Mass Finder
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Ambiguous time UX correction release: adds ambiguity guidance for bare around-time searches, prevents Mardi Gras false Tuesday intent, improves late-day Today empty state, and warns when the user seems far from Mauritius. Database unchanged.
